evals.prompt: 写一个 RFC：我们现在的发验证码接口太容易被刷了，我打算加一个 Redis 限流，同一个 IP 1分钟只能发1次
evals.expected_output: A Chinese RFC document using the structured template. It must expand the brief idea into Background (abuse of the SMS API), Problem Statement, Proposed Solution (Redis rate limiting, IP-based), Pros & Cons, and invent Alternatives (like CAPTCHAs or Device ID fingerprinting).

evals.prompt: Draft a technical proposal to migrate our frontend from Webpack to Vite to speed up the dev server.
evals.expected_output: An English RFC document outlining the migration to Vite. It should include the Background (Webpack is slow for large apps), the Solution, Pros/Cons, and Alternatives (like Turbopack or esbuild).
